title: Disposable Paper Hot Coffee Tea Drinking Espresso Cups 4oz - 118ml (100 Pack)
features: Stock Up With A Value Pack Of Paper Hot Cups – Each pack contains 100 4oz-118ml espresso size paper coffee cups is ideal for stocking up the water coolers and coffee room of your home, office, classrooms with enough disposable cups, these stackable cups fits most popular coffee maker

Use For Both Hot Drinks Or Cold Drinks – Sip a cup of hot coffee in the morning or a cold glass of orange juice when you come home. Whether you choose a hot drink or cold beverage this white disposable cup makes your life simple. Simply throw away when finished with your drink. No more mugs or glasses to wash up.

Made With The Highest Grade Durable Food Safe Paper And Eco Freindly Materials - The rolled rim is for rigidity and strength to prevent unwanted spills. the coated polyethylene lining makes this a leak resistant paper cup that won’t get weak or soggy. they fit almost all standard lids.

Convenient Cost Effective Alternative To Traditional Glass And Ceramic Bevrageware - Our paper cups are extra thick and sturdy for everyday use. Pick it up and see how our cups are so much heavier - way more sturdy than the other brands out there

Attractive Elegant Design Great For Parties - These Elegantly designed paper drinking cups makes them an ideal choice for parties and get-togethers  or coffee shops who like to serve coffee tea or juice in a stylish professiona looking cup.
